_comment: Hand-authored seed taxonomy. Load via bootstrap.cypher before any automation. Same pattern as CFP ontology/seed_concepts.json.

stack_layers.name: Silicon & EDA
stack_layers.description: RTL, EDA flows, FPGA, processor IP, memory compilers

stack_layers.name: Firmware
stack_layers.description: BMC, SBI, JTAG debug, root-of-trust, boot firmware

stack_layers.name: OS & Networking
stack_layers.description: Operating systems, SDN, router firmware, init systems

stack_layers.name: AI & Inference
stack_layers.description: Model formats, inference engines, computer vision, LLM serving

stack_layers.name: Data Governance
stack_layers.description: Lineage, metadata, catalog, data quality, FinOps

tiers.name: Strategic
tiers.description: Track deeply — align with AI infra, hardware, compliance, data-center themes

tiers.name: Practical
tiers.description: Build demos — the end-to-end demo chain

tiers.name: Watchlist
tiers.description: Positioning — silicon trust, open EDA, AI governance, enterprise platforms

concepts.name: root-of-trust
concepts.definition: Hardware anchor for boot integrity and key management

concepts.name: secure-boot
concepts.definition: Verified chain from firmware to OS

concepts.name: attestation
concepts.definition: Cryptographic proof of device identity/state

concepts.name: bmc
concepts.definition: Baseboard Management Controller — out-of-band server management

concepts.name: redfish
concepts.definition: REST API standard for hardware management

concepts.name: ipmi
concepts.definition: Older hardware management protocol

concepts.name: eda-flow
concepts.definition: Electronic Design Automation — RTL to GDSII

concepts.name: place-and-route
concepts.definition: Automated cell placement and wire routing step

concepts.name: synthesis
concepts.definition: RTL to gate-level netlist

concepts.name: observability
concepts.definition: Traces + metrics + logs — understanding system state from outputs

concepts.name: traces
concepts.definition: Distributed request tracing

concepts.name: metrics
concepts.definition: Time-series numerical measurements

concepts.name: logs
concepts.definition: Timestamped event records

concepts.name: policy-as-code
concepts.definition: Expressing access/compliance rules as machine-readable code

concepts.name: rego
concepts.definition: Declarative policy language used by OPA

concepts.name: supply-chain-security
concepts.definition: Integrity and provenance of software build and dependency chain

concepts.name: sbom
concepts.definition: Software Bill of Materials

concepts.name: slsa
concepts.definition: Build provenance framework levels

concepts.name: inference
concepts.definition: Running a trained ML model on input data

concepts.name: model-format
concepts.definition: Serialization format for trained models

concepts.name: graph-optimization
concepts.definition: Transforming compute graph for speed/memory

concepts.name: data-lineage
concepts.definition: Record of where data came from and how it was transformed

concepts.name: data-catalog
concepts.definition: Searchable inventory of datasets and their metadata

concepts.name: iac
concepts.definition: Infrastructure as Code — declarative resource provisioning

concepts.name: container-runtime
concepts.definition: Software that executes container workloads (OCI spec)

concepts.name: service-mesh
concepts.definition: L7 proxy layer for microservice traffic management

concepts.name: edge-cloud
concepts.definition: Cloud infrastructure operating at or near physical endpoints

concepts.name: fine-grained-authz
concepts.definition: Relationship-based access control at object level (ReBAC)

concepts.name: open-isa
concepts.definition: Open instruction set architecture (RISC-V, OpenPOWER)

concepts.name: compliance-scanning
concepts.definition: Automated checking against security benchmarks (CIS, OVAL, XCCDF)
